name: tj_ts_field_mutable
drl: rule R when E2(ts > 100) then end
_finding: D-141 item 1b boundary: the ts FIELD VALUE stays MUTABLE (only the temporal position is fixed). E2.ts 30->211, rule R(ts>100) — oracle & engine both FIRE on 211 (non-temporal read sees the update). This is why the fix snapshots a SEPARATE temporal position rather than freezing the field.
